description: A new physical datacenter deployment has been completed, and the NOC requires the logical monitoring to reflect the physical rack elevation. A deployment manifest is located on your desktop at ~/Desktop/rack_deployment_manifest.csv. First, use OpManager's discovery feature to add the two missing network switches (127.0.0.2 and 127.0.0.3) to the inventory. Then, navigate to the Rack Builder (Maps > Rack Views), create a new 42U rack named exactly 'Core-Rack-A1', and visually place all three devices (127.0.0.1, 127.0.0.2, 127.0.0.3) into their designated U-slots as specified in the manifest. Save the rack view when finished. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
